scripts.build-BillingMonitor: cd BillingMonitor && if [ ! -d ${workspaceFolder}/BillingMonitor/BillingMonitor/node_modules/@vue/cli-service ] && [ ! -d ${workspaceFolder}/BillingMonitor/node_modules/@vue/cli-service ]; then npm i; fi && npm run build
scripts.deploy:mta: npm run build && mbt build && cf deploy mta_archives/*.mtar
